terrain_base.label: Terrain Base
terrain_base.description: Core walkable ground tiles for overworld and dungeon floors.

fluids.label: Fluids
fluids.description: Water, swamp, blood, sludge, lava, and atmospheric fluid tiles.

grass_dirt_transitions.label: Grass/Dirt Transitions
grass_dirt_transitions.description: 16-tile edge blend set for grass meeting dirt.

water_shore_transitions.label: Water Shores
water_shore_transitions.description: 16-tile shoreline blend set for water meeting land.

cliffs.label: Cliffs
cliffs.description: Cliff tops, vertical faces, and rocky elevation edges.

dungeon_walls.label: Dungeon Walls
dungeon_walls.description: Brick wall segments for interior and ruin construction.

decorations_a.label: Decorations A
decorations_a.description: Small props: rocks, bones, fences, containers, and hazards.

decorations_b.label: Decorations B
decorations_b.description: Additional prop variants and dungeon clutter.

decorations_c.label: Decorations C
decorations_c.description: More prop variants for scene dressing.

paths.label: Paths
paths.description: Dirt road and trail junction tiles.

trees_foliage.label: Trees & Foliage
trees_foliage.description: Large organic obstacles and dead woodland features.

cave_underground.label: Cave Underground
cave_underground.description: Cavern floors, stone, and underground hazard tiles.

structures.label: Structures
structures.description: Doors, bridges, altars, and interactive set pieces.

frost_wasteland.label: Frost Wasteland
frost_wasteland.description: Frozen ground, ice, and frost-covered terrain.
